what: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: zuericssstyle R package provides CSS styles styled Shiny components aligned corporate design City Zurich. package includes reusable styling utilities widgets enable development Shiny applications consistent visual identity guidelines City Zurich. components included package base styling widgets previously developed used Statistik Stadt Zürich building Shiny applications.

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: can install latest version zuericssstyle directly repository: Alternatively, can download repository ZIP archive. extracting files local directory (e.g. Desktop), install package using:

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: check currently installed version zuericssstyle, run:

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: zuericssstyle provides set wrapper functions around widgets Shiny apply styling consistent corporate design City Zurich. wrapper functions extend original widgets allowing additional arguments passed underlying Shiny functions.

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: Cards bslib can used Shiny applications HTML outputs. CSS included zuericssstyle (general CSS Shiny-specific CSS, see ) provides styling card components. creating cards, recommend using heading element inside card_header ensure consistent typography spacing.
code: library(bslib) card(   card_header(h5("A random header")),   card_body(     markdown("Some text with a [link](https://www.stadt-zuerich.ch/de/politik-und-verwaltung/statistik-und-daten.html)")   ),   card_footer("a footer") )

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: widgets styled zuericssstyle require package’s CSS loaded. CSS automatically included HTML dependency using either ssz_page() add_zcss_deps(). recommended approach use ssz_page() styled drop-replacement fluidPage() Shiny: application uses different page layout (e.g. fixedPage()), can instead wrap UI definition add_zcss_deps() include required CSS dependencies: ensures zuericssstyle widgets rendered correct styling. additional arguments supported underlying Shiny functions can passed corresponding ssz* functions.

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: sszNumericInput() provides styled numeric input field based numericInput() Shiny.

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: sszSelectInput() provides styled version selectInput() Shiny.
code: sszSelectInput(     "select",     "Destination",     choices = c("HOU", "LAX", "JFK", "SEA"),     selected = "LAX"   )  sszSelectInput(     "selectmultiple",     "Destination (Multiple)",     choices = c("HOU", "LAX", "JFK", "SEA"),     multiple = TRUE   )

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: sszRadioButtons() provides styled version radioButtons() Shiny. current version zuericssstyle, horizontally aligned radio buttons (inline = TRUE) styled appear default Shiny styling.
code: sszRadioButtons(    inputId = "ButtonGroupLabel",    label = "Flughafen:",    choices = c("EWR", "JFK", "LGA"),    selected = "JFK"    )

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: sszRadioGroupButtons() provides styled version radioGroupButtons() shinyWidgets.
code: sszRadioGroupButtons(     inputId = "years",     choices = 2022:2024,     selected = 2022 # default value   )

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: sszTextInput() provides styled version textInput() Shiny.

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: sszAutocompleteInput() provides autocomplete-enabled text input based autocomplete_input() dqshiny package.
code: sszAutocompleteInput(             "name",             "Geben Sie einen Namen ein",             options = c("aoqiheu", "acdzvxp", "aqneluk", "aeloxch")           )

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: sszSliderInput() provides styled version sliderInput() Shiny. Note: 2024-10-16, slider styling officially part corporate design guidelines. Therefore, appearance widget may change future versions package.
code: sszSliderInput("choose_numbers",     "Input",     value = c(30, 60),     min = 0,     max = 100   )  sszSliderInput("choose_number",     "Single Input",     value = c(30),     min = 0,     max = 100   )

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: sszActionButton() provides styled version actionButton() Shiny.

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: sszDownloadButton() provides styled download button based downloadButton() Shiny. label argument specifies text displayed button. must one "Download", "CSV", "XLSX". default value "Download". image argument allows icon image displayed button text. supplied HTML <> tag. default NULL, meaning icon shown. button linking external resource can createt using sszOgdDownload(). Provide appropriate link href parameter
code: sszDownloadButton("csvDownload",       label = "CSV",       image = icons_ssz("download")     )      sszDownloadButton("excelDownload",       label = "XLSX",       image = icons_ssz("download")     )  sszDownloadButton("downloadDownload",       image = icons_ssz("download")     )  sszOgdDownload("ogdDownload",       href = "https://data.stadt-zuerich.ch/"     )

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: sszDateRange() provides styled version dateRangeInput() Shiny. default, language German date format dd.mm.yyyy. additional parameters Shiny’s dateRangeInput can passed parameters.
code: sszDateRange("DateRange", "Datum",     start = "2001-01-01",     end = "2010-12-31",     min = "2001-01-01",     max = "2012-12-21",     separator = icons_ssz("calendar"),     weekstart = 1   )

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: sszAirDatepickerInput() provides styled wrapper around airDatepickerInput() shinyWidgets. Unlike dateRangeInput(), allows selecting years years months, addition full dates. default, language German date format dd.mm.yyyy. can optionally supply custom calendar icon using HTML image tag htmltools::tags$img(...).
code: sszAirDatepickerInput(           inputId = "airMonthStart2",           label = "Basis Datum",           dateFormat = "MM-yyyy",           view = "years",           minView = "months",           autoClose = TRUE,           ssz_icon = img(icons_ssz("calendar"))         )

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: zuericssstyle provides CSS classes style reactable tables way consistent corporate design. styling includes borderless, minimal design subtle striped background readability.
code: reactable(iris,     paginationType = "simple",     language = reactableLang(       noData = "Keine Einträge gefunden",       pageNumbers = "{page} von {pages}",       pagePrevious = "\u276e",       pageNext = "\u276f"     )   )

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: sszContextBox() provides styled box additional contextual information, definitions, explanations, glossary entries. intended give users background context information without indicating warning (see sszWarningBox()). layout uses flexible container align icon text, applies package-specific CSS classes ensure consistent styling. icon argument allows icon image displayed text. default NULL, meaning icon shown.
code: sszContextBox(     title = "Information mit Icon",     text = "Laboris laborum aute id laboris culpa esse aliquip nisi anim velit. Minim sunt eiusmod do laborum amet ut magna. Labore dolore id nostrud enim Lorem pariatur ad dolore id eiusmod adipisicing laboris laborum minim.",     icon = icons_ssz("info-help-filled")   )     sszContextBox(     title = "Informationen ohne Icon",     text = "Laboris laborum aute id laboris culpa esse aliquip nisi anim velit. Minim sunt eiusmod do laborum amet ut magna. Labore dolore id nostrud enim Lorem pariatur ad dolore id eiusmod adipisicing laboris laborum minim."   )

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: sszInfoBox() provides styled box query-related informational messages, summaries explanations current results. meant convey neutral information regarding query , rather warnings general context. sszWarningBox() provides styled warning box alert users potential issues, errors, important considerations regarding query results. layout uses flexible container align icon text, applies package-specific CSS classes ensure consistent styling. sszInfoBox() sszWarningBox() use CSS classes. icon argument allows icon image displayed text. default NULL, meaning icon shown.
code: sszInfoBox(     title = "A message with the wrong sender will not be answered and will be deleted.",     text = "Laboris laborum aute id laboris culpa esse aliquip nisi anim velit. Minim sunt eiusmod do laborum amet ut magna. Labore dolore id nostrud enim Lorem pariatur ad dolore id eiusmod adipisicing laboris laborum minim.",     icon = icons_ssz("info-help-filled")   )  sszWarningBox(     title = "Title Error",     text = "Laboris laborum aute id laboris culpa esse aliquip nisi anim velit. Minim sunt eiusmod do laborum amet ut magna. Labore dolore id nostrud enim Lorem pariatur ad dolore id eiusmod adipisicing laboris laborum minim.",     icon = icons_ssz("important-warning-filled")   )

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: .ssz-chart-buttons CSS class can applied <div> create flexible layout centered content buttom margin, suitable grouping chart-related buttons. Example usage:
code: div(   class = "ssz-chart-buttons",   sszRadioGroupButtons(     inputId = "choice_year",     choices = c(2022, 2023, 2024)     )   )

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: zuericssstyle also provides CSS classes tooltip styling (.tooltip-container, .tooltip-title, .tooltip-content, .tooltip-row). example, see inst/examples/tooltip/app.R. example demonstrates use CSS classes ; provide graphs fully styled according corporate design City uf Zurich. fully styled charts, refer zueriplots documentation.

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html
text: need CSS file style HTML report HTML outputs, use: write needed CSS file local folder. can also specify full file path (e.g. "C:/temp/mystyling.css") parameter.

title: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html

title: sszContextBox — sszContextBox
text: Function generate styled info box optional title, text, icon. layout uses flex container icon text, applies package-specific classes ("context-box-div", "context-box-text", "sszContextBox") consistent styling.

title: sszContextBox — sszContextBox
text: title character string heading context box (displayed h6). text character string body text context box. icon Optional HTML tag icon. NULL (default value), icon displayed.

title: sszContextBox — sszContextBox
text: shiny.tag object representing context box, ready include Shiny UI.

title: sszContextBox — sszContextBox
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ sszContextBox(   title = "No data available",   text  = "Start a query to see results.",   icon  = icons_ssz("info-help") ) } # }

Must one "Download", "CSV" "XLSX", default "Download" image html-tag image/icon added text; default NULL icon optional icon parameter downloadButton, default NULL ... optional named params downloadButton (class parameter ignored/overwritten)

title: sszDownloadButton — sszDownloadButton
text: downloadButton class sszDownload optionally image added

title: sszInfoBox — sszInfoBox
text: Function generate styled information box neutral explanatory messages. info box optionally displays title, descriptive text, icon. Layout based flex container aligns icon text content consistently across use cases. Package-specific CSS classes ("info-box-div", "info-box-content", "sszInfoBox") applied enable scoped styling predictable customization.

title: sszInfoBox — sszInfoBox
text: title character string heading info box (rendered h6 element). NULL (default value), title shown. text character string containing body text info box. icon icon Optional HTML tag icon. NULL (default value), icon displayed.

title: sszInfoBox — sszInfoBox
text: shiny.tag object representing info box, suitable direct inclusion Shiny UI.

title: sszInfoBox — sszInfoBox
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ sszInfoBox(   title = "Information",   text  = "Results are updated automatically when filters change.",   icon  = icons_ssz("info") ) } # }

what: zuericssstyle: Statistik Stadt Zürich CSS styling for shiny apps and html — zuericssstyle-package

text: Maintainer: Sara Hänzi sara.haenzi@zuerich.ch Authors: Alessandro Feller alessandro.feller@zuerich.ch contributors: Statistik Stadt Zürich (SSZ) statistik@zuerich.ch [copyright holder, funder]

title: zuericssstyle 2.0.0
text: Complete redesign previously used Shiny widgets Full rewrite SCSS/CSS align corporate design City Zurich previous widget arguments layouts may changed; check updated README examples New sszContextBox, sszInfoBox, sszWarningBox functions contextual, informational, warning messages

title: zuericssstyle 1.1.1
text: new: css classes tooltip styling chart-button div fix dependency declaration icons package

title: zuericssstyle 1.1.0
text: new: minimal styling bslib cards

title: zuericssstyle 1.0.0
text: functional changes improve pkgdown site add GitHub GitLab badges everything ready publication swissstatsr

title: zuericssstyle 0.2.3
text: functional changes create pkgdown site update packages various minor changes re. documentation package development

title: zuericssstyle 0.2.2
text: functional changes! update packages add GitLab Pipeline automatic code publication GitLab

title: zuericssstyle 0.2.1
text: new function sszRadioGroupButtons, generating styled shinyWidgets::radioGroupButtons

title: zuericssstyle 0.2.0
text: major refactoring css separate scss files, can compiled larger css files use new css files styling remove get_shiny_css function, shiny, ssz_page add_zcss_deps used

title: zuericssstyle 0.1.0
text: add ssz_page add_zcss_deps functions; first directly create fluid page SSZ styling, latter add styling kind html/ui create examples widgets inst/examples remove sszActionButtonIcon, use action button icon anyway work properly
